# Unsettling Lamp

## Description

- Each combat, the first time you play a card that Debuffs an enemy, double its effect.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong with early Uppercut, Tremble, Bash, or Taunt; sequence the first debuff card intentionally so the doubled effect hits the boss or priority enemy.
- Do not spend the first debuff on infinite-HP openings, decoys, or low-priority minions; save it for the real target when possible.
